data.title: Morocco Strategic Minerals Corp. Announces District-Scale Option Agreement in Morocco's Western High Atlas
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Morocco Strategic Minerals Corporation (TSXV: MCC) announced the signing of an option agreement with MNF Groupe Inc. ("MNF"), a subsidiary of Broychim S.A., granting MCC the exclusive option to acquire up to an 80% stake in a collection of mineral assets situated in the Western High Atlas region of Morocco. This deal includes five exploitation licenses - 373220 (Tanfit Mine), 373221 (Ijoukak), 373422 (Amsghni), 393506 (Aït Zekri Mine), and 393505 (Ighrm) - along with two research permits for 3941791 (Tamadghoust) and 3942613 (Tizgui), as well as the environmental authorization for a central flotation plant construction linked to licenses 393506 and 393505 in the Ouneine Valley.

data.title: Netrio Appoints Erin Holt as Vice President of Human Resources
data.description: A seasoned HR professional has been appointed to enhance culture, talent development, and organizational effectiveness at the rapidly expanding global MSP in McKinney, Texas. The company, Netrio, is a leading MSP offering services to mid-market enterprises to upgrade and safeguard their IT infrastructure. This strategic move aims to drive growth and success across the organization as it continues to expand its global presence.

data.title: Green Worldwide Shipping Earns ASA-100 Accreditation, Joining an Exclusive Group of Seven Certified 3PLs Worldwide to Support Aviation and Aerospace Supply Chains
data.description: Located in the heart of a major aerospace hub in the nation, Green Worldwide Shipping is now certified to provide compliant and time-sensitive logistics services in the industry's key operational areas. This certification, effective from April 20, 2026, underscores Green's commitment to efficiently meeting the demands of the aerospace sector. With this new development, Green is well-positioned to deliver essential logistics solutions in a timely and compliant manner.

data.title: Phenom is the Highest-Designated Leader in Everest Group’s Skills Intelligence Platforms PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026
data.description: Philadelphia-based company Phenom has been recognized as the top leader in the Skills Intelligence Platforms category by Everest Group. This ranking was part of the PEAK Matrix® Assessment for 2026. Phenom outperformed its competitors to claim the highest designation in this assessment. This recognition solidifies Phenom's position as a frontrunner in the HR technology sector.

data.title: The Modern Data Company and Bajaj Tech.AI Partner to Deliver Data and AI Solutions Across US and India Financial Services
data.description: A partnership has been established between The Modern Data Company, known for DataOS®, and Bajaj Tech.AI, a prominent technology solutions provider in the BFSI sector under India's $116 billion Bajaj Finserv Ltd. This collaboration aims to expedite the provision of enterprise data and AI solutions within financial services markets in the U.S. and India. The alliance seeks to merge expertise to enhance services in key sectors.

data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Costa Mesa, California, Simpluris, Inc. as the Fund Administrator for the United States Securities and Exchange Commission announced updates on the Compass Minerals International, Inc. Fair Fund and Plan of Distribution. This notice pertains to the proceedings concerning the distribution of funds related to Compass Minerals International, Inc.

data.title: GovCon and AEC Professionals Gather for Unanet Champions 2026 to Learn, Connect and Grow in a Defining Moment for Project-Based Businesses
data.description: This year's annual user conference in DULLES, Virginia on April 20, 2026, brought together the Unanet community to focus on advancements in agentic AI. Key highlights included the availability of GrowthStudio, previews of GAUGE and Inspire Report, and discussions on changing industry dynamics. Unanet, recognized as a leader in AI-first ERP, hosted the event, which saw a significant number of participants and provided valuable market insights.
